caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses stands against a plain, dark grey background. She wears a light green, embroidered tunic with a dark beaded necklace and a small lapel microphone clipped to the center of her neckline. In the bottom left corner of each frame, a small logo and the text "NPTEL" are visible. As the sequence progresses, the woman speaks and uses hand gestures to emphasize her points. In the initial frame, her hands are held low and open; in the next, she raises her hands slightly higher and moves them outwards. In the final two frames, she continues speaking, with her hands shifting and gesturing in front of her. Her facial expressions change subtly as she speaks, reflecting the cadence of her delivery.
